title: Best of Kenya Safari
description: A comprehensive Kenya safari combining northern wildlife, central parks, Maasai Mara and Diani Beach. Ideal for wildlife enthusiasts who also want a relaxing coastal retreat.
highlights: Full day guided game drives in Samburu, Ol Pejeta, Nakuru & Maasai Mara
Visit to Chimpanzee Sanctuary at Ol Pejeta
Big Five spotting and Great Migration (Jul–Oct)
Optional boat rides and coastal excursions in Diani
Accommodation at top lodges and Swahili Beach Resort

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Samburu
itinerary.description: Pick up from hotel at 07:30 hrs. Drive 4½ hrs to Samburu Intrepids Camp. Lunch and afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Overnight at Samburu Intrepids Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Samburu
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Optional visit to a Samburu village. Overnight at Samburu Intrepids Camp.

itinerary.title: Samburu to Ol Pejeta
itinerary.description: Drive to Ol Pejeta Wildlife Sanctuary (~short drive). Lunch at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp. Afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Overnight at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day at Ol Pejeta
itinerary.description: Optional morning and afternoon game drives. Overnight at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp.

itinerary.title: Ol Pejeta to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: Drive 3½ hrs to Lake Nakuru. Lunch at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge. Afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Spot flamingoes, black & white rhinos, and Rothschild giraffe. Overnight at Nakuru Sopa Lodge.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Early morning game drive, then depart to Maasai Mara (~5 hrs). Lunch and afternoon game drive at Ashnil Mara Camp. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Optional full-day drive with packed lunch. Big Five spotting and Great Migration (Jul–Oct). Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara to Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Early morning departure at 06:30 hrs. Flight to Diani (~1¼ hrs). Transfer to Swahili Beach Resort & SPA for next 4 nights. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Optional activities: Chale Island tour, swimming with dolphins at Wasini Island, water sports. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Relax or take optional excursions. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Relax or take optional excursions. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check out after lunch. Transfer to Diani Airstrip for flight to Nairobi at 15:30 hrs, arriving at 17:00 hrs. END OF SERVICE.

included: Accommodation on Full Board in all lodges, half board at Swahili Beach Resort
Exclusive use of safari Mini-Van (not shared)
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
Return air ticket Nairobi – Diani – Nairobi on Safarilink
Excursions to Wasini and Chale Islands
notIncluded: Personal expenses (travel insurance, laundry, phone calls, meals/drinks not indicated)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses, malaria medication. Early mornings and evenings can be cool; a sweater and trousers/jeans are recommended.
travelInfo.food: Buffet meals at lodges, some set menus. All food prepared by professional chefs.

note: Adventures Connect LTD reserves the right to vary the accommodations mentioned to a similar facility in circumstances beyond our control.
